title: Lead/Principal Software Engineer
description:
We partner with other firms to accelerate their product capabilities through embedded modernisation and innovation initiatives whilst establishing permanent in-house teams that drive broader transformation. The firm brings together exceptional engineering, product, and design talent to work directly within agencies, delivering world-class solutions and building sustainable capabilities that serve Singapore. As a member of this firm, you'll leverage your expertise to deliver high-impact modernisation projects while mentoring the firms teams and establishing permanent product capabilities that create lasting change for other firms

As a Lead / Principal Software Engineer, you will:

• Advise and guide client agencies from problem definition through to solution design, in both greenfield and brownfield implementations.

•  Advise and guide agency partners from problem definition through to solution design, in both greenfield and brownfield implementations

•  Address complex, high-impact challenges at a national scale, driving innovation that improves efficiency and effectiveness across other firms

•  Champion engineering excellence by influencing the adoption and continuous improvement of engineering standards and best practices across the firm.

•   Serve as the lead architect working with the firm and industry partner teams to ensure smooth handover from recommendations to implementation—owning the outcomes

•  Establish and mentor permanent engineering teams within agencies, transferring technical expertise and engineering best practices

•   Develop standardised approaches for assessments, discovery, and solution design, grounded in the firm and industry best practices

You’ll thrive here if you

•  Enjoy untangling complex technology and business problems

•  Can translate complex tech into clear, non-technical language

•  Focus on value and outcomes, not just technical solutions

•  Influence through trust, collaboration, and clarity

•   Love working upstream to define problems and shape the right solutions

Requirements;

•   10+ years of experience in multi-squad development teams with a career progression to Architect

•   Adaptable with experience working in different industries, in-house development, consultancy.

•   Curious and a problem-solver - understands the need to balance building things right with building the right things

•   Actively mentors and cultivates future technical leaders, fostering a culture of continuous learning and excellence

•   Exceptional communicator and collaborator - able to communicate effectively with technical and non-technical audiences, with a belief that working across teams and organisations is more effective than operating as a solo unit

The firm is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive workplace that values diverse voices and perspectives, as we believe it is key to innovation.
